name: Show OOS products with the exclude OOS products setup
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you have a setup in our dashboard to exclude OOS products from Merchandising Cloud widgets:"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ZD5C5U1Z72DE/fa8efc6-shopify-findify-include-oos-products-if-oos-setup.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ZD5C5U1Z72DE/fa8efc6-shopify-findify-include-oos-products-if-oos-setup.png","name":"fa8efc6-Shopify-findify-include-oos-products-if-oos-setup.png","type":"image/png","size":44418,"width":1394,"height":672,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":544,"dateInserted":"2025-09-18T19:53:12+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"And you still want to show OOS products as if they are in-stock, you have 2 options:"}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"1. Use "},{"text":"Continue Selling when OOS","bold":true},{"text":" option on the variant level in Shopify."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If the variant has this setup, Merchandising Cloud will read the variant as available and will still show it in our results."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://files.readme.io/fd16ae2-Shopify-findify-include-oos-products-if-oos-setup-continue-selling.png","embedData":{"url":"https://files.readme.io/fd16ae2-Shopify-findify-include-oos-products-if-oos-setup-continue-selling.png","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"external"}},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"2. Use findify-live:true tag."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If the setup above is non-applicaple, you can setup a product tag: "},{"text":"findify-live:true","bold":true},{"text":" on the products that you still want to show even if OOS. Once the tag is in place, please contact our support "},{"type":"a","url":"mailto:support@maropost.com","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"support@maropost .com"}]},{"text":" to adjust the setup internally."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://files.readme.io/23456d6-Shopify-findify-include-oos-products-if-oos-setup-tag.png","embedData":{"url":"https://files.readme.io/23456d6-Shopify-findify-include-oos-products-if-oos-setup-tag.png","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"external"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
